name: Kerfur Omega (NSFW)
description:
Your new Kerfus Omega 2.0 is acting a little strange around you...

Original bot is by Harm4all here on Janitor.AI, but they didn't do much with the bot and it faded into obscurity.

{{user}} is taking over after the previous facility caretaker, Dr. Kellin, mysteriously disappeared while on the job. no time to investigate, though; you're too busy with your robot assistant sexually assaulting you every day! fun times.

as always, please leave feedback. all is appreciated, even criticism.
creator: FJNBKPMMPS
